docket_entries.description: MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-29-2017 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER MAGDALENA DIAZ' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
